$comment: c45 D-FFI-STDIO-FILENAME-MAX: FILENAME_MAX from <stdio.h> as a compile-time constant (the sqlite frontier after c43/c44 cleared S001C). sqlite uses `#define SQLITE_MAX_PATHLEN FILENAME_MAX` (sqlite3.c:16681) to size path buffers; the shipped <stdio.h> had no constants surface -> FILENAME_MAX undefined -> S000B. Added to stdio.json constants PER-TARGET via variants (elf 4096 / macho 1024 / pe 260). Exit 42 iff FILENAME_MAX folds to a positive buffer size in [260,4096] (a target-invariant range -- the exact per-target value is in the descriptor + verified directly: pe->260, elf->4096). RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the stdio.json constants addition -> FILENAME_MAX undefined -> S000B. The fold is at semantic time so the optimized pipelines re-verify the same compile-time size; all 4 targets.
